sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83555" key="platopoii/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰτοποιία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, prob. <sense id="n83555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">manufacture of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλάται,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2142</biblScope> </bibl>(pl., <date TEIform="date">iv A.D.</date>; written <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ειῶν</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
